ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geospatial_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "wkt_representation" TEXT /* Well-known text representation of the feature's geometry */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the feature (e.g., point, line, polygon) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of detail for the feature */,
  "graphic_group" INTEGER /* Group identifier for graphic elements */,
  "color_index" INTEGER /* Color index for the feature */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the feature (e.g., line thickness) */,
  "style" INTEGER /* Style identifier for the feature */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text label for the feature */,
  "ulink" TEXT /* URL link associated with the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was deleted */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the feature */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the feature */,
  "deleted_by" TEXT /* User who deleted the feature */,
  "z_coordinate" INTEGER /* Z-coordinate for 3D points */,
  "height_above_ground" INTEGER /* Height above ground for the feature */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_features_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_features_graphic_group FOREIGN KEY ("graphic_group") REFERENCES graphic_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_features_color_index FOREIGN KEY ("color_index") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_features_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES feature_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_features_style FOREIGN KEY ("style") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature type (e.g., natural, man-made) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "zoom_level" INTEGER /* Zoom level for the feature (e.g., 1-20) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graphic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graphic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the graphic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the graphic group */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon for the graphic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_hex" TEXT /* Hexadecimal representation of the color */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  "rgb_values" TEXT /* RGB values of the color (e.g., R,G,B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "css_class" TEXT /* CSS class for the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature the label belongs to */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the label */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Size of the font */,
  "font_color" TEXT /* Color of the font */,
  "font_style" TEXT /* Style of the font */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the label (e.g., horizontal, vertical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES geospatial_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature the link belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the external link */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES geospatial_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_history_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES geospatial_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature that is indexed */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometry of the feature */,
  "bounds" TEXT /* Bounding box of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_index_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES geospatial_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature that the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES geospatial_features ("feature_id")
)
